message: `plan.md` is missing the required `Summary` section.
remediation: Add `## Summary` and keep it limited to planning-control-plane purpose and scope.

message: `plan.md` is missing the required `Handoff Protocol` section.
remediation: Add `## Handoff Protocol` and keep routing rules explicit for `/sdd.plan.*`, `/sdd.tasks`, and queue ownership.

message: `plan.md` is missing the required `Shared Context Snapshot` section.
remediation: Add `## Shared Context Snapshot` and keep it limited to shared bootstrap facts.

message: `plan.md` is missing the required `Stage Queue` section.
remediation: Add `## Stage Queue` and keep fixed queue rows for planning orchestration.

message: `plan.md` is missing the required `Binding Projection Index` section.
remediation: Add `## Binding Projection Index` and keep only minimal projection fields.

message: `plan.md` is missing the required `Artifact Status` section.
remediation: Add `## Artifact Status` and keep per-binding artifact queue status only.

message: `plan.md` is missing the required `Complexity Tracking` section.
remediation: Add `## Complexity Tracking` and keep it reserved for justified constitution violations only.

message: `plan.md` Feature Identity status is inconsistent with current Stage Queue / Artifact Status progress.
remediation: Set `Feature Identity -> Status` to `planning-not-started`, `planning-in-progress`, or `planning-complete` so it matches the actual control-plane state.

message: Abstract Boundary Anchor token (BA-*) is used where concrete implementation surface is required.
remediation: Replace BA-* placeholders with concrete boundary anchors tied to repository-backed surfaces.

message: Contracts are missing Boundary Anchor or repo-anchor declaration (or explicit TODO(REPO_ANCHOR) blocker).
remediation: Add the normative `Boundary Anchor`, keep repo-anchor evidence in `Upstream References`, or mark unresolved items with TODO(REPO_ANCHOR).

message: Contracts are missing explicit Anchor Status declaration required by the repo-anchor decision protocol.
remediation: Add `Anchor Status` (or legacy `Repo Anchor Status`) and keep it aligned to `existing|extended|new|todo`.

message: Data model is missing Anchor Status fields required by the repo-anchor decision protocol.
remediation: Add `Anchor Status` fields and keep them aligned to `existing|extended|new|todo`.

message: Test matrix is missing the `Binding Packets` section required by template-baseline binding projection governance.
remediation: Add `## Binding Packets` and keep packet rows aligned to stable binding projection semantics.

message: Test matrix is missing `UIF Path Ref(s)` required by template-baseline binding projection governance.
remediation: Add `UIF Path Ref(s)` to `Binding Packets` and keep values aligned to the selected UIF path family.

message: Contracts are missing explicit Boundary Anchor declaration for northbound binding.
remediation: Add `Boundary Anchor` and keep it aligned to the first consumer-callable entry.

message: Contracts are missing Implementation Entry Anchor Status required by the repo-anchor decision protocol.
remediation: Add `Implementation Entry Anchor Status` and keep it aligned to `existing|extended|new|todo`.

message: Anchor Status uses values outside the allowed repo-anchor decision protocol vocabulary.
remediation: Use only `existing`, `extended`, `new`, or `todo` for all anchor-status fields.

message: Repo anchor target is not using strict path::symbol format.
remediation: Use strict `path::symbol` format for repo anchors; single-colon `path:Symbol` is invalid.

message: Repo anchor `path::symbol` points to a file that does not exist under the feature repo root.
remediation: Keep unresolved anchors as `TODO(REPO_ANCHOR)` until the target file exists, or change the anchor to a real repository-backed path.

message: Repo anchor `path::symbol` points to a file that does not exist under the feature repo root.
remediation: Keep unresolved anchors as `TODO(REPO_ANCHOR)` until the target file exists, or change the anchor to a real repository-backed path.

message: Data model is missing Anchor Role fields required by the repo-anchor role taxonomy.
remediation: Add `Anchor Role` and align values to `owner|state-source|projection-source|carrier|partial-lineage`.

message: Test matrix is missing `UDD Ref(s)` fields required by template-baseline binding packets.
remediation: Add `UDD Ref(s)` to `Binding Packets` and keep values aligned to spec-backed data semantics.

message: Contract `Shared Semantic Reuse` table contains invalid constraint types.
remediation: Use only `shared-semantic-element`, `owner-source-alignment`, `shared-field-vocabulary`, `lifecycle-invariant`, `downstream-contract-constraint`, or `none`.

message: Contract contains template placeholders or unresolved symbol placeholders.
remediation: Replace all template placeholders (e.g., `[operationId]`, angle-bracket labels) with concrete names and resolve all symbols.

message: Contract `new` anchors are missing required `existing rejected:` and `extended rejected:` strategy evidence.
remediation: Fill `Boundary Anchor Strategy Evidence` and `Implementation Entry Anchor Strategy Evidence` with explicit rejection reasons for `existing` and `extended` before using `new`.

message: Test matrix is missing `Interface Partition Decisions` required by the latest stage contract.
remediation: Add `## Interface Partition Decisions` and keep northbound binding splits authoritative there.

message: Test matrix is missing `UIF Full Path Coverage Graph (Mermaid)` required by the latest stage contract.
remediation: Add `## UIF Full Path Coverage Graph (Mermaid)` and keep it spec-derived only.

message: Test matrix is missing `UIF Path Coverage Ledger` required by the latest stage contract.
remediation: Add `## UIF Path Coverage Ledger` and account for every selected-scope UIF path exactly once.

message: Test matrix is missing `Scenario Matrix` required by the latest stage contract.
remediation: Add `## Scenario Matrix` and keep scenario-level verification semantics explicit.

message: Test matrix is missing `Verification Case Anchors` required by the latest stage contract.
remediation: Add `## Verification Case Anchors` and keep TM/TC observability anchors explicit.

message: Contracts are missing explicit repo-anchor declaration required by the unified contract template.
remediation: Add `repo anchors:` in `Upstream References` and keep it aligned to boundary/entry/request-response/collaborator/middleware/dependency symbols.

message: Research repo anchors must not use module-root or directory-only paths in `Source Path / Symbol`.
remediation: Use a concrete file path or `path/to/file.ext::Symbol`; directory-only values such as `aidm-api/` are invalid research anchors.

message: Data model is missing `Shared Semantic Class Model` required by the latest shared-semantic handoff.
remediation: Add `## Shared Semantic Class Model` and keep shared-class landing explicit there.

message: Data model is missing `Owner / Source Alignment` required by the latest shared-semantic handoff.
remediation: Add `## Owner / Source Alignment` and close shared owner/source semantics there.

message: Data model is missing `Shared Field Vocabulary` required by the latest shared-semantic handoff.
remediation: Add `## Shared Field Vocabulary` and keep shared semantic vocabulary explicit there.

message: Data model is missing `Downstream Contract Constraints` required by the latest contract handoff.
remediation: Add `## Downstream Contract Constraints` and map each dependent binding to required shared semantic refs.

message: Data model is missing `State Transition Table` required by the lifecycle handoff policy.
remediation: Add `### State Transition Table` and make shared transitions explicit for each lifecycle.

message: Data model is missing `Repo-First Strategy Evidence` required by the shared-semantic landing policy.
remediation: Add `Repo-First Strategy Evidence` to `Shared Semantic Elements` and record why `existing` / `extended` were rejected for each `new` row.

message: Data model contains contract-flavored names that do not belong in shared semantics.
remediation: Rename shared semantic rows/UML nodes to stable business names and keep DTO/request/response/command/result types in `/sdd.plan.contract`.

message: Data model contains interface-role names that do not belong in shared semantics.
remediation: Keep controller/service/facade labels out of shared semantic rows/UML nodes and use stable business owners/projections/lifecycles instead.

message: `Anchor Status = new` rows are missing concrete repo-first strategy evidence.
remediation: Fill `Repo-First Strategy Evidence` with why `existing` and `extended` were rejected before using `new`.

message: Northbound binding violates controller-first HTTP entry constraints derived from feature layering.
remediation: Use HTTP `METHOD /path` as Boundary Anchor, the owning controller method as Implementation Entry Anchor, and keep service/facade symbols as downstream collaborators.

message: `Binding Projection Index` contains contract-design fields that do not belong in the planning control plane.
remediation: Keep `Binding Projection Index` limited to minimal binding projection fields only; remove boundary, entry, status, DTO, collaborator, and other contract-design columns.

message: Selected `BindingRowID` projection drifts across `plan.md` and `test-matrix.md`.
remediation: Repair the selected `Binding Packets` row via `/sdd.plan.test-matrix` and regenerate the minimal `Binding Projection Index`; do not use generated contracts to rewrite upstream projections.

message: Contract collaborators include unresolved or invented symbols.
remediation: Replace unresolved collaborator symbols with repository-anchored canonical symbols (or block with TODO(REPO_ANCHOR) when unresolved).

message: Contracts contain known placeholder/invented symbols or ambiguous boundary-anchor wording.
remediation: Replace placeholders with repository-anchored concrete symbols and use one normative boundary anchor per operation.

message: Contracts are missing explicit `Binding Context` section required by the unified contract template.
remediation: Add `## Binding Context` and keep binding locator fields explicit for the selected `BindingRowID`.

message: Contracts are missing explicit Implementation Entry Anchor required by the unified contract template.
remediation: Add an Implementation Entry Anchor and align it to the first internal handoff entry that realizes the contract boundary.

message: Contracts are missing the `Closure Check` section required for operation-local closure validation.
remediation: Add `## Closure Check` and keep unresolved items explicit as `ok/gap` evidence.

message: Contracts are missing the `Sequence Design` section required for executable collaboration closure.
remediation: Add `## Sequence Design` and keep success/failure paths contiguous with mandatory collaborator and middleware calls.

message: Contracts are missing the `Interface-definition closure` check row.
remediation: Add the row in `Closure Check` and verify request/response surface plus field dictionary plus shared semantic reuse are complete.

message: Contracts are missing the `Sequence closure` check row.
remediation: Add the row in `Closure Check` and verify success/failure paths cover mandatory second-party, third-party, and middleware calls.

message: Contracts are missing the `UML closure` check row.
remediation: Add the row in `Closure Check` and verify class diagram and two-party package relations are present and consistent with sequence.

message: Contracts are missing the `Test closure` check row.
remediation: Add the row in `Closure Check` and verify `TM/TC`, pass/failure anchors, and command/assertion signal are complete.

message: Contracts are missing the operation-scoped full field dictionary required for field-level contract authority.
remediation: Add `Full Field Dictionary (Operation-scoped)` and keep it authoritative for owner/default/validation/persisted/source semantics.

message: Contracts are missing the reader-oriented `Contract Summary` subsection required by the updated unified contract template.
remediation: Add `### Contract Summary` under `## Interface Definition` and keep field-level authority in `Full Field Dictionary (Operation-scoped)`.

message: Contracts are missing `Test Projection Slice` required by the updated contract template.
remediation: Add `### Test Projection Slice` and keep IF/Operation/TM/TC/pass-failure anchors plus command/assertion signal explicit.

message: Contracts are missing `Dictionary Tier` classification required by the updated field dictionary protocol.
remediation: Add `Dictionary Tier` to `Full Field Dictionary (Operation-scoped)` and classify rows as `operation-critical|owner-residual`.

message: Contracts are missing `Cross-Interface Smoke Candidate` required by downstream smoke orchestration.
remediation: Add `### Cross-Interface Smoke Candidate` in `Test Projection` and keep one explicit candidate row for the selected operation.

message: Contracts are missing `Resolved Type Inventory` required for concrete naming closure.
remediation: Add `### Resolved Type Inventory` and resolve all contract-visible symbols before marking the contract `done`.

message: Contracts are missing `Artifact Quality Signals (Normative)` from the unified contract skeleton.
remediation: Restore `## Artifact Quality Signals (Normative)`; simplified contract skeletons are not allowed.

message: Contracts are missing `Northbound Entry Rules (Normative)` from the unified contract skeleton.
remediation: Restore `## Northbound Entry Rules (Normative)` and keep boundary-entry constraints explicit.

message: Contracts are missing `Two-Party Package Relations` required by UML/package closure.
remediation: Add `### Two-Party Package Relations` and model package ownership/dependency direction explicitly.

message: Lifecycle anchors are missing from data model semantics.
remediation: Add lifecycle/state-transition anchors where domain semantics require them.
